title: Fatale Game
description: Seri Tainaka is a manga artist with a one-hit-wonder. Her title, "To Hell and Back" was widely loved...but her successes end there. When Seri meets her quirky new editor, Sumire Futami, she is both shocked and captivated by this fascinating woman... Shrouded in mystery, Futami seems to be hiding some truths about herself. With the ladies teamed up, their Fatale Game begins here!
author: Battan

1.title: I'LL GO TO HELL AND BACK
